title: Improbable (company)
body: Improbable Worlds Limited (commonly referred to as Improbable) is a multinational technology company founded in 2012 and headquartered in London, England. It makes metaverse infrastructure and applications, as well as simulation software for video games and corporate use. In fiscal 2022, Improbable reported revenues of £78 million, compared to £22 million in 2021.
